summary: Backend (6/6 pytest passed) and frontend critical UI flows fully verified for Stock Eventos app. Inventory seeded with 262 materials, all CRUD/blocking/PDF/close-reopen/delete-restore-stock flows work correctly. UI navigation, material/provider/event creation, blocking material with category filter, PDF button, close/reopen, calendar tab all functional.

minor.issue: Negative quantity check happens AFTER computing/applying delta path; quantity<0 is correctly rejected but ordering could allow odd error messages. Not user-impacting.
Returns 200 even when provider does not exist (no 404). Also, deleting a provider does not unset provider_id/provider_name on existing event rentals — orphan references remain.

action_items: (Minor) Consider returning 404 from DELETE /api/providers/{pid} when not found, and cascade/clear provider_id on rentals when a provider is deleted.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py block_material: delta validation is solid; consider validating quantity<0 BEFORE computing delta for clearer errors.
server.py: no input length validation on free-text fields (name, notes) — minor, low priority.
PDF export uses Helvetica which may not render some Spanish characters perfectly (acentos/ñ work in latin-1 subset, OK in practice).
All endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id via PROJ projection. Async usage is correct throughout.
Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via lib/api.js — env-driven, no hardcoded URLs spotted in pages.
data-testid coverage is excellent across all interactive elements.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up by tests where applicable. UI test created TEST_UI_<ts> material, TEST_Prov_<ts> provider, TEST_Evt_<ts> event (event was deleted at end of UI flow; the TEST_UI_ material and TEST_Prov_ provider remain in DB).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_stock_eventos.py pass. UI flows verified via Playwright: Dashboard load, Inventory search/create, Providers create, Events create, Event detail (block material with 89 options listed via category filter), close/reopen, delete with stock restore, Calendar tab. Minor cleanup: 1 leftover TEST_UI_* material and TEST_Prov_* provider may exist in DB from UI run.
